   393→    Private Sub ThreadTaskAtlasTool1()
   394→
   395→        Dim buffsize As Integer
   396→        Dim InStream1(1024) As Byte
   397→        Dim temp1 As String = ""
   398→        Dim ToolData As Double
   399→        Dim ToolDecision As String
   400→
   401→        Do
   402→            Try
   403→                ClientSocketTool1.ReceiveBufferSize = 1024
   404→                buffsize = ClientSocketTool1.ReceiveBufferSize
   405→                ServerStreamTool1.Read(InStream1, 0, InStream1.Length)
   406→                Dim Returndata As String = System.Text.Encoding.Default.GetString(InStream1)
   407→                For i As Integer = 1 To Len(Returndata)
   408→                    temp1 = temp1 & "" & Chr(Asc(Mid(Returndata, i, 1)))
   409→                Next i
   410→                If Mid(temp1, 5, 4) = "0002" Then
   411→                    Tool1ConnectionStep = 2
   412→                ElseIf temp1.Contains("0061001") Then
   413→                    ToolData = CDbl(Mid(temp1, 141, 4) & "." & Mid(temp1, 145, 2))
   414→                    If Mid(temp1, 108, 1) = "1" Then
   415→                        ToolDecision = "OK"
   416→                    Else
   417→                        ToolDecision = "NG"
   418→                    End If
   419→                    RequestTool1Data("0020" & "0062" & "001" & "0" & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(0))
   420→
   421→                    If wStep = 6 And srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" Then
   422→                        If srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text <> "OK" And srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text <> "OK" Then
   423→                            srcSAB_TQ1.Text = CStr(ToolData)
   424→                            If ToolData >= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MAX And ToolDecision = "OK" Then
   425→                                srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text = "OK"
   426→                                srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
   427→                                DingDOng()
   428→                            Else
   429→                                srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text = "NG"
   430→                                srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
   431→                                NG()
   432→                            End If
   433→                        ElseIf srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text = "OK" And srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text <> "OK" Then
   434→                            srcSAB_TQ2.Text = CStr(ToolData)
   435→                            If ToolData >= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MAX And ToolDecision = "OK" Then
   436→                                srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text = "OK"
   437→                                srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
   438→                                srcSAB_TQ_DEc.Text = "OK"
   439→                                srcSAB_TQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
   440→                                DingDOng()
   441→                            Else
   442→                                srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text = "NG"
   443→                                srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
   444→                                NG()
   445→                            End If
   446→                        End If
   447→
   448→                    End If
   449→
   450→                End If
   451→                temp1 = ""
   452→            Catch ex As Exception
   453→            End Try
   454→            Application.DoEvents()

   464→    Sub SerialOpen()
   465→
   466→        If CheckPing(ToolIP) = True Then
   467→            Trd3 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTaskAtlasTool1)
   468→            Trd3.IsBackground = True
   469→            Trd3.Start()
   470→            Tool1ConnectionStep = 0
   471→            tMRtool1.Interval = 100
   472→            tMRtool1.Start()
   473→        Else

   475→        End If
   476→
   477→        Try
   478→            If Serial_RFID1.IsOpen() = True Then
   479→                Serial_RFID1.Close()
   480→            End If
   481→            Serial_RFID1.PortName = PortNumber_RFID1
   482→            Serial_RFID1.ReceivedBytesThreshold = 50
   483→            Serial_RFID1.BaudRate = 9600
   484→            Serial_RFID1.DataBits = 8
   485→            Serial_RFID1.Open()
   486→

   489→        End Try

   491→        Try
   492→            If Serial_Scanner.IsOpen() = True Then
   493→                Serial_Scanner.Close()
   494→            End If
   495→            Serial_Scanner.PortName = PortNumber_SCANNER
   496→            Serial_Scanner.BaudRate = 9600
   497→            Serial_Scanner.DataBits = 8
   498→            Serial_Scanner.Open()

   500→        Catch ex As Exception

   503→        End Try
   504→
   505→        Try
   506→            If Serial_Tool.IsOpen() = True Then
   507→                Serial_Tool.Close()

   509→            Serial_Tool.PortName = PortNumber_TOOL
   510→            Serial_Tool.BaudRate = 9600

```vb
Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner.DataReceived

    Dim Incoming As String
    Dim ScanData As String

    Incoming = Serial_Scanner.ReadLine()

    ScanData = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
    Label_Scanner.Text = ScanData

    Serial_Scanner.DiscardInBuffer()

    If wStep = 6 Then

            If FLAG_BELT_DUP AndAlso CheckDuplicate("TABLE_MAIN_RH", "ST02_BELT_SN", ScanData) = True Then
                srcSEAT_BELT_BArcode.Text = ScanData
                srcSEAT_BELT_BArcode_DEc.Text = "중복"
                srcSEAT_BELT_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Red
                NG()
            Else
                srcSEAT_BELT_BArcode.Text = ScanData
                srcSEAT_BELT_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK"
                srcSEAT_BELT_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                DingDOng()
            End If
        ElseIf InStr(1, ScanData, srcSAB_BArcode_Target.Text) <> 0 And srcSAB_BArcode_Target.Text <> "0" And srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text <> "NA" Then
            If FLAG_SAB_DUP AndAlso CheckDuplicate("TABLE_MAIN_RH", "SAB_SERIAL", ScanData) = True Then
                C.Text = ScanData
                srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "중복"
                srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Red
                NG()
            Else
                C.Text = ScanData
                srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK"
                srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                DingDOng()
            End If
        Else
            NG()
        End If

    End If

End Sub
```
